articles.title: Are Mercedes a step ahead of the competition in Austria?
articles.summary: The silver cars of Mercedes looked mighty fine as they navigated the beautiful Red Bull Ring nestled in the Styrian Hills during Friday practice for the Austrian Grand Prix. But are they the one to beat in Spielberg – or

articles.title: Leclerc expects Ferrari to struggle after ‘difficult Friday’
articles.summary: Charles Leclerc believes that Ferrari could be in for a tricky weekend at the Austrian Grand Prix following some struggles on Friday.

articles.title: What the teams said – Friday in Austria
articles.summary: The drivers and teams report back on Friday practice from the Red Bull Ring ahead of the Austrian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Cadillac reflect on Friday problems in Austria
articles.summary: Cadillac have revealed that an electrical problem impacted Sergio Perez's running on Friday ahead of the Austrian Grand Prix, as Valtteri Bottas also suffered issues later in the day.

articles.title: Red Bull ‘feels like the usual’ after upgrades – Hadjar
articles.summary: After Red Bull arrived into their home event with a range of upgrades, Isack Hadjar has given his take on how the car felt out on track during Friday's practice sessions in Austria.

articles.title: Verstappen to McLaren? F1’s ‘silly season’ is ramping up
articles.summary: Formula 1's 'silly season' has flicked up a gear at the Red Bull Ring, with Max Verstappen, McLaren, Racing Bulls and Esteban Ocon all in the thick of it – but what is really going down?

articles.title: Piastri admits McLaren ‘a step behind’ Antonelli in Austria
articles.summary: McLaren enjoyed a strong performance in Friday’s running at the Austrian Grand Prix, with Oscar Piastri finishing the day in P2.

articles.title: Mercedes expect to have ‘fight on our hands’ in Austria
articles.summary: Mercedes are braced for McLaren, Red Bull and Ferrari to all potentially pose a threat as the Austrian Grand Prix weekend develops, despite their pace-setting start to the event with Kimi Antonelli on Friday.

articles.title: Hayu Yamakoshi secures maiden F3 pole position in Spielberg
articles.summary: F3 driver Hiyu Yamakoshi claimed a surprise pole position at the Red Bull Ring.

articles.title: Leon’s strategy call earns him F2 pole in Spielberg
articles.summary: Noel Leon took his maiden Formula 2 pole position in Spielberg, beating Alexander Dunne and his Campos Racing team mate Nikola Tsolov to top spot on Friday.

articles.title: Ferrari conquista Pole Position histórica nas 24 Horas de Spa
articles.summary: A Ferrari garantiu o direito de largar da primeira posição na mítica corrida das CrowdStrike 24 Horas de Spa, quarta ronda do Endurance Cup do GT World Challenge Europe. O piloto italiano Alessio Rovera realizou uma exib

articles.title: EUA proíbem vendas da Polestar

articles.title: Volkswagen: menos quatro fábricas e 100.000 empregos!

articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli colocou novamente a Mercedes em posição de claro favoritismo no primeiro dia de treinos livres para o Grande Prémio da Áustria de Fórmula 1, oitava ronda da temporada de 2026 da Fórmula 1. Após já ter dita

articles.summary: Thierry Neuville terminou a primeira longa etapa do Rali da Acrópole na liderança da classificação geral, confirmando a reputação de extrema dureza da mítica prova grega. Ao volante do Hyundai i20 N Rally1, o piloto belg

articles.title: Rali da Acrópole: Mikkelsen supera Virves e lidera WRC2
articles.summary: Andreas Mikkelsen terminou a etapa de sexta-feira na liderança do WRC2 no Rali da Acrópole, na Grécia. Ao volante de um Škoda Fabia RS Rally2, o piloto superou uma jornada marcada pelo exigente piso de terra, poeira e fo

articles.summary: Noel León conquistou a sua primeira pole position na FIA Fórmula 2 após uma decisão estratégica brilhante na sessão de qualificação realizada esta tarde no Red Bull Ring, na Áustria. O jovem estreante da Campos Racing ap

articles.title: WRC, Rali da Acrópole/PEC7: Hyundai na frente, Neuville manteve Ogier afastado
articles.summary: Adrien Fourmaux (Hyundai i20 N Rally1) vence especial no fecho do primeiro dia de prova, enquanto Thierry Neuville (Hyundai i20 N Rally1) segura o comando da classificação geral e Oliver Solberg (Toyota GR Yaris Rally1)
